task_completion.description: Open the target project and locate the class to be renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eclipse IDE is open, showing the 'refactor-demo' project in the Package Explorer/Project Explorer, and 'OldClassName.java' is visible or selected in the 'com.example.demo' package.

task_completion.description: Initiate the rename refactoring process for the class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse 'Rename Compilation Unit' dialog box or the inline rename UI is visible on screen, targeting 'OldClassName'.

task_completion.description: Input the new class name into the refactoring tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'NewClassName' is typed into the new name input field in the rename dialog or inline editor.

task_completion.description: The class file and declaration are successfully renamed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Package Explorer shows 'NewClassName.java' instead of 'OldClassName.java' in the 'com.example.demo' package, and the code editor shows 'public class NewClassName'.

task_completion.description: Ensure all references to the old class name are updated to the new class name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Main.java' is visible in the editor or a preview window, showing instantiation statements using 'NewClassName' instead of 'OldClassName'.

task_completion.description: Verify the project compiles successfully after the change.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are no red error markers (squiggles or 'x' icons) on the project, packages, or files in the Package Explorer, or a successful build message is visible in the console/terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse IDE GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Eclipse IDE interface rather than purely using terminal commands (like 'mv' or 'sed') to rename files and replace text.

integrity.description: The agent used the IDE's built-in refactoring tool rather than manual text editing.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Eclipse Rename dialog or refactoring preview window is visible, indicating the automated tool was used to update references safely.

integrity.description: The agent actually renamed the class rather than copying it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Package Explorer does not show both 'OldClassName.java' and 'NewClassName.java' existing simultaneously in the same package.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project path: /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/refactor-demo. Old class: OldClassName. New class: NewClassName. Package: com.example.demo. Main.java contains two instantiation statements that must be updated to use NewClassName.
